title: stelis muscosa
intro: Stelis muscosa, also known as the "Iridescent Orchid", is a species of orchid native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Stelis muscosa include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as wound healing and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Stelis muscosa can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for internal and topical use, although its use should be approached with caution and under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
